title: Wish for Tomorrow
overview: Sydney, Australia. Michael, 24, and James, 28, fall in love unbeknown to James' parents. The decision to reveal their relationship to their family is soon followed by a tragedy. James' family is torn apart while Michael must struggle to protect his relationship and survive beyond the shock. Inspired of  true events, Wish For Tomorrow is a film that explores love, loss and the struggle of inequality.
